description: Component for ingesting Pinterest Ads data using dlt - returns DataFrames.

asset_name.label: Asset Name
asset_name.description: Name of the asset that will hold the Pinterest Ads data

access_token.label: Access Token
access_token.description: Pinterest OAuth 2.0 Access Token with ads:read scope. Use ${PINTEREST_ACCESS_TOKEN} for env vars.

ad_account_ids.label: Ad Account Ids
ad_account_ids.description: Comma-separated list of Pinterest Ad Account IDs (e.g.,

resources.label: Resources
resources.description: Comma-separated list of resources to extract: ad_accounts, campaigns, ad_groups, ads, pins, keywords, analytics

granularity.label: Granularity
granularity.description: Analytics granularity: DAY, HOUR, WEEK, or MONTH

level.label: Level
level.description: Analytics aggregation level: AD_ACCOUNT, CAMPAIGN, AD_GROUP, AD, KEYWORD, or PIN_PROMOTION

owners.label: Owners
owners.description: Asset owners — team names (team:analytics) or email addresses.

asset_tags.label: Asset Tags
asset_tags.description: Key-value tags applied to the asset in the Dagster catalog, e.g. {"domain": "finance"}.

kinds.label: Kinds
kinds.description: Asset kinds shown in the Dagster catalog (e.g. snowflake, python). Auto-inferred from component name if empty.

freshness_max_lag_minutes.label: Freshness Max Lag (minutes)
freshness_max_lag_minutes.description: Maximum acceptable lag in minutes before this asset is considered stale.

freshness_cron.label: Freshness Cron Schedule
freshness_cron.description: Cron schedule for the freshness policy, e.g. '0 9 * * 1-5' (weekdays 9am).

include_sample_metadata.label: Include Sample Metadata
include_sample_metadata.description: Include sample data preview in metadata

destination_config.label: Destination Config
destination_config.description: Optional destination configuration as connection string or JSON. Required if destination is set.

persist_and_return.label: Persist And Return
persist_and_return.description: If True with destination set: persist to database AND return DataFrame. If False: only persist to database.

deps.label: Deps
deps.description: Upstream asset keys this asset depends on (e.g. [
